title: Dogfood Samantha live worker dashboard visibility
setupCommands: for i in $(seq 1 12); do echo "dashboard dogfood setup heartbeat $i/12"; sleep 5; done
instructions: Read the repository status without changing files. This is a dashboard visibility dogfood. Wait for setup to finish, inspect README.md and docs/REMOTE_ADAPTERS.md, then return HARNESS_RESULT with status pass, a note explaining whether the live observer was available, and an empty commit.
